docs.title: Welcome to DevOps Documentation
docs.text: Here, I publish all the documentation stuffs learned during my devops journey.

docs.title: Java17 Installation
docs.text:
Make a .sh file and paste the code below

sudo apt update -y
sudo apt install fontconfig openjdk-17-jre -y


java --version

docs.title: Install Jenkins LTS
docs.text:
Make a .sh file and paste the code below

sudo wget -O /usr/share/keyrings/jenkins-keyring.asc \
https://pkg.jenkins.io/debian-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/jenkins-keyring.asc]" \
https://pkg.jenkins.io/debian-stable binary/ | sudo tee \
/etc/apt/sources.list.d/jenkins.list > /dev/null
sudo apt-get update -y
sudo apt-get install jenkins -y

docs.title: Browse Jenkins
docs.text: Browse to http://localhost:8080 (or whichever port you configured for Jenkins when installing it) and wait until the Unlock Jenkins page appears.
